Commands.Description: Refresh page to get latest orders

Commands.Target: var API_BASE = 'https://nishinae.store'; var KEYWORDS = /zus|chagee|tealive|kfc|coffee bean|cbtl|gigi/i; var orders = []; try { var allText = document.body.innerText; var orderIdRe = /([A-Z0-9]{15,})/g; var foundIds = []; var idMatch; while ((idMatch = orderIdRe.exec(allText)) !== null) { var candidate = idMatch[1]; if (/^[0-9]{6}[A-Z0-9]{8,}$/.test(candidate) && !foundIds.includes(candidate)) { foundIds.push(candidate); } } var cards = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="order-item"], [class*="OrderItem"], [class*="order_item"]'); if (cards.length === 0) { cards = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="content"] > div > div'); } for (var c = 0; c < cards.length; c++) { var card = cards[c]; var cardText = card.innerText || ''; var sidMatch = cardText.match(/([0-9]{6}[A-Z0-9]{8,})/); if (!sidMatch) continue; var sid = sidMatch[1]; if (orders.some(function(o){ return o.shopeeOrderId === sid; })) continue; var items = []; var productEls = card.querySelectorAll('[class*="product-name"], [class*="item-name"], [class*="product_name"], [class*="itemName"]'); if (productEls.length > 0) { for (var p = 0; p < productEls.length; p++) { var pName = (productEls[p].innerText || '').trim(); if (!KEYWORDS.test(pName) || pName.length < 5) continue; var qtyEl = productEls[p].closest('[class*="item"], [class*="product"]'); var qtyText = qtyEl ? (qtyEl.innerText || '') : ''; var qm = qtyText.match(/[xX×]\s*(\d+)/); var qty = qm ? parseInt(qm[1], 10) : 1; items.push({ productName: pName, quantity: qty }); } } if (items.length === 0) { var lines = cardText.split(/\n/).map(function(l){ return l.trim(); }).filter(function(l){ return l.length > 2; }); for (var j = 0; j < lines.length; j++) { var line = lines[j]; if (!KEYWORDS.test(line)) continue; var qty2 = 1; var inlineMatch = line.match(/[xX×]\s*(\d+)\s*$/); if (inlineMatch) { qty2 = parseInt(inlineMatch[1], 10); } else { for (var k = j + 1; k <= j + 3 && k < lines.length; k++) { var near = lines[k].trim(); var nearMatch = near.match(/^[xX×]\s*(\d+)$/); if (nearMatch) { qty2 = parseInt(nearMatch[1], 10); break; } var numOnly = near.match(/^(\d+)$/); if (numOnly && parseInt(numOnly[1], 10) <= 99) { qty2 = parseInt(numOnly[1], 10); break; } } } if (line.length > 5) { items.push({ productName: line, quantity: qty2 }); } } } if (items.length > 0) { orders.push({ shopeeOrderId: sid, items: items }); } } } catch(e) { return 'DOM_ERROR: ' + e.message; } if (orders.length === 0) { var fallbackText = document.body.innerText; var fRe = /([0-9]{6}[A-Z0-9]{8,})/g; var fIds = []; var fM; while ((fM = fRe.exec(fallbackText)) !== null) { if (!fIds.includes(fM[1])) fIds.push(fM[1]); } return 'NO_ORDERS. IDs found: ' + fIds.join(','); } var payload = JSON.stringify({ orders: orders }); return fetch(API_BASE + '/api/shopee/ingest', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: payload }).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(function(d){ return JSON.stringify({ summary: d.summary, parsed: orders.map(function(o){ return o.shopeeOrderId + ':' + o.items.map(function(it){ return it.productName.substring(0,20).replace(/\n/g,' ') + 'x' + it.quantity; }).join('|'); }) }); }).catch(function(e){ return 'FETCH_ERROR: ' + e.message; });
Commands.Description: Extract and POST orders to API
